title: Pan Seared Norwegian Lamb Skewers
description: A sweet and crispy Norwegian dish featuring lamb skewers, dry sherry, and a robata grill, perfect for a special occasion, this recipe is gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together dry sherry, olive oil, honey, garlic, rosemary, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Place the skewers on the robata grill and cook for 10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Increase the heat to 500 degrees Fahrenheit and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the lamb is crispy on the outside.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the lamb skewers hot, garnished with additional rosemary if desired.
